title: ehretia scandens
intro: Ehretia scandens, also known as the climbing ehretia or tropical ehretia, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ehretia scandens include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Ehretia scandens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine practices in its native regions.
